name: East Texas Pecan Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop pecans coarsely.
2. Cream butter (margarine) and shortening until smooth.
3. Gradually beat in confectioners' powdered sugar.
4. Thoroughly stir in the flour, then add vanilla extract and pecans.
5. Mix well.
6. Drop by spoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes, or until light brown.
Makes 4 dozen.
